ab: mogaz, yabo rana do vahey ta o saki, mangey kapa manazang.
en: mogaz, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ya pamyan do panonotongan, ji na manazang!
ya ji makanet o yasa, mangey kapa manazang so adoa.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: ko manazang so saki, yamyan an?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: yamyan, yapira o mo sazangan?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: ko manazang so yadoa tagow, ka no yasalavat a mojis.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: oya do jya mojis, ya myan pa so mo ikakza?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: ko manazang so icyoi, yamyan do jya?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: da na nimiminani sazangan.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: ko manazang so ayob.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: yakman so ajin o mo i kaza?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: ko manazang so ainged so ari lawang.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: manngo o ya mabazangbang eya?
en: How about this red one?

ab: ya mya so ya macitarek?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: ya pamyan so ya malavang kano mowgaraw.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: toro mo jyaken o ya mowgaraw.
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: molingwan, kani mangey jino no kacitoai ang? ka ni mangey mapazigton?
ch: W:molingwan你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: molingwan, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: beken, ko ni mangey manazang so yakan ni yakes.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: ori i, kameywalam si mahep, a pya ka peyheza ta koman.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: taosya, ta ko mangey manazang so ayob ko.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: macih za ko jimo.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: akokey, apira ngina no yakan?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: yadoa poo.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: yapira ngina no wakey?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: yat loa poo yasa ka naneng.
en: Thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: i panta mo yaken so a doabedbe da yakan, kano asa ka naneng a wakey.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
